segments.lat: ex tuis litteris et ex re ipsa nos funditus perisse video. te oro ut quibus in rebus tui mei indigebunt nostris miseriis ne desis. ego te, ut scribis, cito videbo.
segments.eng: From your letter, and from the matter itself, I see that we are utterly destroyed. I beg you that, in whatever matters my people will need yours, you not fail us in our miseries. I shall, as you write, see you soon.
